		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10)) (BikerDogeToken.sol#761)

		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (BikerDogeToken.sol#913)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (BikerDogeToken.sol#915)

	- BikerDogeToken._takeTeam(uint256) (BikerDogeToken.sol#927-935)
	- BikerDogeToken._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (BikerDogeToken.sol#887-923)
	- BikerDogeToken.balanceOf(address) (BikerDogeToken.sol#451-455)
	- BikerDogeToken.constructor(address,address) (BikerDogeToken.sol#397-415)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (BikerDogeToken.sol#725)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (BikerDogeToken.sol#941)
	BikerDogeToken._rTotal (BikerDogeToken.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BikerDogeToken._getCurrentSupply() (BikerDogeToken.sol#1083-1093)
	- BikerDogeToken._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (BikerDogeToken.sol#939-945)

	- BikerDogeToken.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (BikerDogeToken.sol#555-577)
